commit.message:
Add YouTube Player lab feature with built-in video playback (#26)

* Add built-in YouTube video player as Labs feature

Introduce a new Labs toggle for an in-app YouTube player that loads the
actual YouTube website with heavy JS/CSS injection to isolate the video
player. Includes playback controls (PiP, rewind, play/pause, fast
forward, fullscreen), action toolbar (open in app, open in browser),
and YouTube sign-in support for PiP functionality.

Update ArticleLink, ArticleDetailView, and FeedStyleView to route
YouTube URLs through the new player when the Labs toggle is enabled.
Update XLoginView to use Button(role:) pattern for toolbar buttons.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ni1RdnK18zbv3tZ5xYVFJp

* Gate PiP behind YouTube Premium check per YouTube ToS

PiP now requires both being signed in and having YouTube Premium.
Detects Premium status by loading YouTube's page and checking for
premium membership indicators in the page data.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ni1RdnK18zbv3tZ5xYVFJp

* Fix Sendable warning by marking Coordinator as @MainActor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ni1RdnK18zbv3tZ5xYVFJp

* Fix non-Sendable Timer access in deinit with nonisolated(unsafe)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ni1RdnK18zbv3tZ5xYVFJp

* Replace deinit with dismantleUIView for timer cleanup

Move Timer invalidation out of deinit (which is always nonisolated)
into dismantleUIView, avoiding the non-Sendable Timer access error.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ni1RdnK18zbv3tZ5xYVFJp

* Add icons to More menu items

Labs (flask), Source Code (curlybraces), and Attribution (heart).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ni1RdnK18zbv3tZ5xYVFJp

* Add icons to background refresh and badge toggles

Background Refresh (arrow.clockwise), Notification Badge (app.badge).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ni1RdnK18zbv3tZ5xYVFJp

* Add icons to Apple Intelligence section toggles

While You Slept (moon.stars), Today's Summary (newspaper).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Ni1RdnK18zbv3tZ5xYVFJp

---------

commit.message:
feat: production hardening — subscriptions, CSRF, rate limiting, N+1 fixes, monitoring

Security:
- CSRF Double Submit Cookie (server/middleware/csrf.ts)
- Admin IP whitelist (server/middleware/adminIp.ts, ADMIN_ALLOWED_IPS env)
- CSRF token auto-injected in all mutating apiRequest() calls

Subscriptions & paywall:
- subscription_plans + salon_subscriptions tables (migration 0026)
- startTrial() 14d, lifecycle cron trialing→expired
- requireFeature() middleware → 402 on /owner/analytics/* and /bookings/advanced
- Frontend UpgradeModal (402 intercept) + /pricing page + i18n RU/EN/UZ

Observability:
- x-request-id middleware + slowRequestLogger (warn >500ms, error >2000ms)
- Replaced inline logger block in server/index.ts

Payment hardening (prior session):
- Payment FSM (payment-fsm.ts) + unit tests
- Webhook idempotency (external_event_id UNIQUE partial index, migration 0024)
- GMV materialized view + hourly CONCURRENT refresh (migration 0023)

Booking drafts (prior session):
- booking_drafts table (migration 0025), GET/POST/DELETE /api/bookings/draft
- Hourly cleanup cron

DB / migrations:
- migrations/*.sql now tracked in git (fix .gitignore)
- npm run db:verify — checks required tables exist in DB
- npm run db:push — blocked in NODE_ENV=production
- npm run smoke / smoke:prod — curl health check script

N+1 fix:
- owner.routes.ts dashboard alerts: 2N queries → 2 batch queries

Docs:
- RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md, DB_MIGRATIONS.md, DB_PERFORMANCE.md
- DEPLOY_BLUE_GREEN.md, GMV_VIEW.md, RATE_LIMITING.md, REDIS_SESSIONS.md

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: firewall bypass SOCKS proxy + agent environment prompt (#15)

* feat: add firewall bypass SOCKS proxy and agent environment prompt

Add root-only firewall-bypass script (/usr/local/bin/firewall-bypass, chmod 700)
that starts a temporary SSH SOCKS proxy on localhost:9100 for one-off downloads
without modifying iptables or egress policy. Default timeout 30s, auto-kills.

Add ENVIRONMENT.md agent prompt (root-owned, chmod 444, content-hash verified)
that teaches the agent about restart limitations, config management via Pulumi,
and firewall constraints including how to request bypass access. Injected into
AGENTS.md via sed prepend. Bootstrap-extra-files hook forces it into context.

Templates (bypass.ts, agent-prompt.ts) are pure functions using config/defaults
constants. Reference stack updated with matching static copies. 255 tests pass.

fix(cass): update sha256 checksums for v0.2.0 release binaries

The v0.2.0 release binaries were rebuilt after the formula was created,
causing checksum mismatches on all platforms. Updated all three:
- darwin-arm64: bdf7b7ff...
- linux-amd64: 32ccb596...
- linux-arm64: 11ec6b72...

Closes Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search#98

commit.message:
Fix GIF recording memory issue: disk-based frame storage with ring buffer (v3.6.6)

Save frames to disk instead of memory to prevent OOM crashes on long recordings.
Keep only the latest 1500 frames (2.5 min) via ring buffer, generate GIF in
background with progress indicator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Babbage Engine Buildout -- CLI, TUI, historical machines, Fourmilab compat

Implements the 7-phase Babbage Engine Buildout plan (1144 -> 1377 tests, +233).

Phase 1 (Consolidation):
- types.py: BabbageNumber.get_checksum(), _error_flag
- barrels.py: verbose flag gates debug prints in BarrelController.step()
- analytical_engine.py: output_callback/mode/_emit() captures all print() output;
  removed dead Instruction stub block

Phase 2 (CLI Framework):
- backend/src/emulator/cli/ subpackage with Click app entry point
- Commands: run, step, debug, trace, repl, assemble, deck, tui
- Two-pass assembler supporting # and ; comments, comma operands, #immediates
- Fourmilab card deck parser in cli/assembler/fourmilab.py

Phase 3 (TUI Dashboard):
- backend/src/emulator/cli/tui/ with BabbageApp (Textual)
- 5 widgets: RegisterPanel, MemoryInspector, TracePanel, AnimationPanel, StatusBar
- 4 animation modules: gear_wheels, barrel_rotation, carry_propagation, mill_operation
- Background engine execution via threading with message-passing snapshots

Phase 4 (Lovelace Notes B/C/D):
- lovelace_notes.py: run_note_b_mult/div/compound, run_note_c, run_note_d
- YAML card decks: docs/simulation/NOTE_B/C/D_DECK.yaml

Phase 5 (Historical Machines):
- scheutz.py: 7-register 6th-order Difference Engine (1851); propagates D0+=D1 low-to-high
- ludgate.py: 192-column Analytical Machine (1909); Irish logarithm multiplication
- torres_quevedo.py: first floating-point machine (1914); mantissa in [0.1,1.0)
- zuse_z1.py: first binary computer (1938); ZuseFloat 22-bit (1+7+14), bias 64

Phase 6 (Fourmilab Compatibility):
- fourmilab_compat.py: parse_fourmilab_deck, fourmilab_to_instructions, run_fourmilab_deck
- L card fix: emits LOAD B A (save result to prior) then LOAD A [col] -- correct two-register model
- 4 example decks: add_two_numbers.ae, multiply.ae, factorial.ae, bernoulli.ae

Phase 7 (Integration):
- __init__.py: exports all new machines, fourmilab/lovelace functions
- adapter.py: ScheutzAdapter, LudgateAdapter, TorresQuevedoAdapter, ZuseZ1Adapter
- EXTENSIONS_CLASSIFICATION.md: Tier D historical contemporaries documented
- tools/babbage_emulator.py: converted to thin shim (from 1061 lines of duplicate code)
- backend/setup.py: ancient-compute console_scripts entry point registered
- DEFERRED_WORK.md: web TUI, CLI install step, sound/PLAY, physics coupling deferred

commit.message:
fix: remove title attribute after tooltip init to prevent browser native tooltip

Root cause: title attribute remained on elements after Bootstrap tooltip
initialization, causing browser to show its native (unstyled) tooltip
alongside the styled Bootstrap tooltip.

Fix: Remove title attribute after moving its value to data-original-title.

commit.message:
Fix IPv6 email failure on Render by resolving SMTP host to IPv4

Nodemailer v8 ignores the `family: 4` transport option and randomly
picks between IPv4/IPv6 addresses. Since Render free tier doesn't
support IPv6 outbound, SMTP connections randomly fail with ENETUNREACH.

Fix: resolve smtp.gmail.com to IPv4 at startup and pass the IP address
directly as the host, with tls.servername set for TLS verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add logging to MOEX turnovers fetcher (was silently swallowing errors)

Replaced bare except: continue with logged warning to help diagnose
API rate limiting and data gaps in future pipeline runs.

commit.message:
feat(builder): add 16 new components to catalog, bump index to v3.0

New MIT-licensed components across 8 new categories:
- animation: anime, motion, kute, canvas-confetti
- physics: matter, proton
- scroll: sal (AOS alternative, 2.5kb)
- text: rough-notation (hand-drawn SVG annotations)
- interaction: cursor-effects, micron
- page-transitions: barba
- physics-animation: popmotion (Framer Motion engine)
- webgl-renderer: pixi (PixiJS 2D + displacement shaders)
- webgl-shaders: ogl (minimal 15kb WebGL)
- webgl-image-effects: curtains (HTML img → GLSL distortion)
- svg-distortion: warp

index.json v3.0: 34 total components, 3 new preset combos
(physics, webgl, celebration), sal added to scroll category.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[REFACTOR] 클라이언트 코드 리팩토링 및 성능 최적화 (#208)

* [CLEANUP] 미사용 NotificationGuideModal 컴포넌트 삭제

codebase 전체에서 import하는 곳이 없는 데드 코드를 제거한다.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [CLEANUP] ToggleSwitch에서 불필요한 hidden checkbox input 제거

role="switch" button이 접근성을 담당하므로 no-op onChange의
hidden checkbox는 불필요하다. 관련 CSS 클래스와 테스트도 정리한다.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [REFACTOR] useClickOutside 훅 추출로 중복 이벤트 리스너 패턴 제거

4곳(MoreMenu, SearchBar, NotificationDropdown, ProfileDropdown)에서
동일하게 반복되던 mousedown + Escape 리스너 패턴을 공용 훅으로 통합한다.
SearchBar에 Escape 키 지원이 추가되며, active 파라미터로 조건부 리스너
등록을 지원한다. 훅 단위 테스트 5건 추가.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [PERF] MarkdownRender의 components/remarkPlugins를 모듈 스코프로 이동

렌더링마다 새 객체가 생성되어 ReactMarkdown이 불필요하게 리렌더되던
문제를 해결한다. 클로저 의존성이 없으므로 안전하게 호이스팅 가능.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [PERF] react-syntax-highlighter를 React.lazy로 코드 스플릿

~640KB의 syntax highlighter 번들을 코드 블록이 실제 렌더될 때만
동적 로드하도록 분리한다. 인라인 코드는 즉시 렌더, 블록 코드는
Suspense fallback(<pre><code>)으로 감싸 lazy 로딩한다.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [PERF] useInfiniteScroll observer 재생성 최적화 및 Header 드롭다운 상호 배제

useInfiniteScroll: loadMore를 ref로 관리하여 IntersectionObserver가
hasMore 변경 시에만 재생성되도록 개선한다.
Header: 알림/프로필 드롭다운 클릭 시 상대 드롭다운을 닫아 동시 열림을 방지한다.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [FEAT] Button/Input/Select ref 지원 추가 및 Badge 도메인 상수 외부화

React 19에서 ref를 일반 prop으로 전달하는 패턴을 적용하여 Button,
Input, Select에 ref 지원을 추가한다. 각 컴포넌트에 ref 테스트 1건씩 추가.
Badge의 도메인 데이터(STATUS_LABELS, TRACK_LABELS 등)를
src/constants/badges.js로 분리하여 재사용성을 높인다.

commit.message:
feat: Spring AI 1.1.2 @Tool 애노테이션 기반 리팩토링 구현

Spring AI 1.1.2의 새로운 @Tool 애노테이션 방식을 도입하여 Function Calling 구현을 간소화합니다.

주요 변경사항:
- LibraryTools: 도서관정보나루 API용 @Tool 기반 클래스 (8개 메서드)
  * searchBooks: 내부 DB → 도서관정보나루 Fallback
  * getLibrariesWithBook: 대출 가능 도서관 조회
  * searchLibraries: 도서관 검색
  * getBookDetail: 도서 상세 정보
  * getPopularBooks: 인기대출도서 조회
  * getHotTrendBooks: 대출 급상승 도서 조회
  * getRecommendedBooks: 추천도서 조회
  * checkBookExists: 도서 소장 여부 확인

- InternalBookTools: 내부 DB 검색용 @Tool 기반 클래스 (3개 메서드)
  * searchInternalBooks: 내부 DB 하이브리드 검색
  * getReviews: 리뷰 조회
  * checkLoanAvailability: 대출 가능 여부 조회

- ToolBasedAiOrchestrationService: @Tool 기반 오케스트레이션 서비스
  * FunctionToolCallback.builder() → @Tool 애노테이션
  * .defaultTools()로 자동 등록
  * 기존 AiOrchestrationService와 병행 운영

개선 효과:
- 코드 간결화 (애노테이션 기반)
- @ToolParam으로 직관적인 파라미터 설명
- Spring 자동 스캔 및 등록
- 기존 코드 유지 (LibraryFunctions, AiOrchestrationService)

- AutoTrader 주문 체인에 TradingGuard 가드 삽입 (BUY-only 차단)
- CostAnalyzer 비용 기록 (fill 후) + 예산 초과 시 KillSwitch 연동

- 통합 테스트 8건 추가 (guard chain, budget trip, backward compat)
- 버전 3.8.1 + CHANGELOG v3.7.0/v3.8.0/v3.8.1 정리

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [#159] 리뷰 피드백 반영: fail-open, 예산 기간 정합성, 테스트 보강

- CostAnalyzer.analyze_order() fail-open 예외 격리 (주문 상태 보존)
- 예산 점검 기간 일관성: since=today 제거 → 누적 비용/수익 동일 기간 비교
- KillSwitch 이중 인스턴스 제거 (kill_switch_guard 재사용)
- record_trade_result 호출 보증 assert 추가 (stop_loss, exit_signal, inverse_etf)
- CostAnalyzer 예외 격리 테스트 추가 (fail-open 검증)
- go_live_check CostAnalyzer 테스트 3건 추가
- ruff format 적용 (CI 차단 해제)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [#159] Live 경로 CostAnalyzer fail-open 수정 + 회귀 테스트

- Live 주문 성공 후 analyze_order() 예외가 주문 상태(FILLED)를 FAILED로
  바꾸는 버그 수정: 별도 try/except로 격리 (fail-open)
- Live 경로 fail-open 회귀 테스트 추가 (FILLED 상태 보존 검증)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [#159] AC17 paper_trade_report 정확성 테스트 + 린트 정리

- save_state() → print_report() 라운드트립 정확성 검증 테스트 추가
- test_cost_analyzer.py 미사용 import 제거 (F401/F811)
- 5개 테스트 파일 ruff format 적용

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [#159] Go-Live Gate 심화 검증 + VI/CB 통합 테스트 + PnL 값 검증

- check_kis_token(): env 변수 미설정 시 False 반환 (false positive 제거)
- check_kis_balance(): hasattr → callable + get_account_summary 추가 검증
- check_position_sync(): hasattr → 인스턴스 생성 + verify() 확인
- check_dry_run_order(): inspect.signature → AutoTrader 인스턴스 생성 + 가드 연결 검증
- VI/CB detector 통합 테스트 2건 추가 (BUY 차단, SELL 통과)
- record_trade_result PnL 값 검증으로 assertion 강화 (3건)
- go_live_check 테스트 업데이트 (env 변수 누락 테스트 추가)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [#159] check_position_sync mypy 수정: 인스턴스 생성 → 시그니처 검증

PositionSyncVerifier는 kis_client, tracker 필수 인자가 있어
go_live_check에서 인스턴스 생성 불가. callable + inspect.signature로 대체.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* [#159] fix: check_kis_balance가 존재하지 않는 get_account_summary 검증하던 버그 수정

get_account_summary()는 KISAPIClient에 존재하지 않는 메서드.
실제 존재하는 get_daily_fills()로 변경하여 go_live_check 정확성 향상.

feat: reorder symbol groups and reorganize formulas

- New order: 기본이율 → 시점별적립현가 → 현가종가인수 → 주요관계식 → 명목이율세부 → 연금3종
- Add 1+i to 기본이율
- Move a_n| formula to 기말급연금, move ä_n| and ä=a(1+i) to 기시급연금
- 주요관계식 now contains only pure rate identities (v, d, i relations)

feat(testing): Two-tier testing infrastructure — Playwright + agent-browser

Split testing into Tier 1 (Playwright, deterministic, zero LLM, <60s) and
Tier 2 (agent-browser, visual QA only, run selectively).

New files:
- e2e/auth.setup.ts: Playwright auth fixtures (4 roles)
- e2e/smoke/*.spec.ts: 174 generated smoke tests across 26 waves
- scripts/generate_playwright_tests.py: REGRESSION-TESTS.md → Playwright
- scripts/cleanup_chrome.py: Robust zombie chrome process cleanup
- scripts/route_stability.py: Per-route pass history for conditional visual QA

Modified:
- playwright.config.ts: Auth setup project, 4 role projects, JSON reporter
- autonomous_config.py: PLAYWRIGHT_SMOKE mode, feature flags
- autonomous_frontend.py: Playwright-first regression pipeline
- autonomous_steps.py: run_playwright_smoke(), cleanup functions, gated mode
- implement-frontend-feature.md: Phase 5A.5 Playwright gate
- ui-tester-agent.md: Playwright-Gated Mode section
- polish-frontend.md: Playwright smoke before agent-browser
- .gitignore: Add .auth/, e2e-results/

commit.message:
Fix excessive dimming on node focus in classes view

Compound namespace-container nodes were being dimmed along with their
children, causing opacity to multiply (0.15 × 0.15 ≈ 0). Now containers
are excluded from dimmed and hover-dimmed to prevent the cascade effect.

feat(cli): unified --backend selection with serial/audio flags via factory

- Add global --backend lan|serial (default lan) to preserve existing behavior
- Add --serial-port, --serial-baud for serial backend connection
- Add --rx-device, --tx-device for USB audio device override (serial backend)
- Add --list-audio-devices to enumerate system audio devices and exit
- Route radio instantiation through create_radio(BackendConfig) factory
- make discover backend-aware: serial backend returns clear actionable error
- _build_backend_config() builds typed LanBackendConfig or SerialBackendConfig from CLI args
- _cmd_list_audio_devices() lists USB audio devices in plain or JSON format
- All env vars: ICOM_SERIAL_DEVICE, ICOM_SERIAL_BAUDRATE, ICOM_USB_RX_DEVICE, ICOM_USB_TX_DEVICE

Tests: 156 pass across test_cli.py, test_cli_async.py, test_cli_coverage.py,
test_backend_factory.py, test_serial_backend_smoke.py (full suite: 1928 passed)

Closes #147

commit.message:
Feature: Mehrseitiges Dashboard mit Tab-Navigation

- Neue usePages.ts Hook: verwaltet mehrere Seiten mit eigenem Widget-Layout
- 3 Standard-Seiten: Übersicht, Arbeit, Privat (vorkonfiguriert)
- Tab-Bar unter dem Header: Seiten wechseln, umbenennen (Doppelklick), löschen
- Neue Seite per + hinzufügen, leere Seite, dann Widgets per Picker befüllen
- Jede Seite hat eigene Widget-Auswahl und eigenes Grid-Layout
- Migration: bestehende Supabase-Daten werden in Seite "Übersicht" übernommen
- Sync: Seiten werden in Supabase user_settings.pages_data gespeichert

Fix assemble_reel to use angle-specific clip directories

The assembly function was hardcoding hook/ and reaction/ directories,
causing "clip not found" errors for fear-angle runs where clips live
in hook-fear/ and reaction-fear/. Now uses ANGLE_CLIP_DIRS lookup.

Add JSON-based map layout editor with district grouping and selection overlay

Replace hardcoded district anchors with a layout.json file that stores positions,
district colors, and grouping boxes. Add map editor for dragging locations, selection
overlay, grouping box renderer, and auto-centering camera on load.

Add Greek B1 vocabulary database with 2172 words and verb conjugations

- SQLite database with words, conjugations, and examples tables
- 580 curated B1 words covering 25+ CEFR topics with articles and categories
- 1592 additional words from the Duolingo Greek vocabulary tree
- 2706 conjugation entries (present, past, future) for 153 verbs via Cooljugator
- Scripts: create_db, compile_vocabulary, scrape_conjugations, verify_db

commit.message:
feat: close one-shot reliability gaps — dep validation, read-file overlap, bootstrap gates

- Add dependency validation + cycle detection in _set_story_deps (filter invalid IDs, DFS cycle removal)
- Add read_files column + write-read overlap detection in pm_check_conflicts
- Add bootstrap auto-dependency enforcement in run-stories (title heuristic + no-deps signal)
- Add post-bootstrap build verification gate in run-stories (project-type-aware)
- Add requirements sufficiency warning in /ship inline mode (redirects to /presearch)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: replace step 3 with fail-hard Android SDK detection

- Old step 3 (basic ADB warn-only check) replaced with comprehensive
  Android SDK detection that stops the installer if SDK not found
- Checks ANDROID_HOME → ANDROID_SDK_ROOT → %LOCALAPPDATA%\Android\Sdk
  → %USERPROFILE%\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk in priority order
- Sets ANDROID_HOME, ANDROID_SDK_ROOT, PATH on detection
- Validates adb.exe is executable after SDK detection
- Removed old step 8 (duplicate SDK detection) — replaced with mkdir only
- All GOTO :step8 refs updated to GOTO :create_folders
- Header step listing updated (7 steps, no step 8)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: mobile keyboard causes layout to clip input/send button

Add interactive-widget=resizes-content to viewport meta so iOS Safari
resizes dvh units when the virtual keyboard appears/disappears.
Also use safe-area-inset-bottom on the message input so the home
indicator bar doesn't overlap the input on iPhone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix icon path doubling in build.bat

PyInstaller resolves --icon relative to its own working directory,
not the repo root, causing build\icon.ico to expand to build\build\icon.ico.
Fix by capturing the repo root in REPO_ROOT and using absolute paths
for --icon, --distpath, --workpath, and --specpath.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
chore(deps): update dependency go to v1.26.1 (#227)

* chore(deps): update dependency go to v1.26.1

* fix(ci): use go-version-file to match toolchain directive

The toolchain bump to go1.26.1 caused a version mismatch with the
CI-installed go1.26.0 (from go-version: '1.26'), breaking coverage
instrumentation: "compile: version go1.26.1 does not match go tool
version go1.26.0".

Switch to go-version-file: 'go.mod' so setup-go reads the toolchain
directive directly. This prevents future Renovate toolchain bumps from
requiring CI workflow changes.

Also remove the explicit Go modules cache step, which is redundant with
setup-go@v5's built-in module caching.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): extract Go version from toolchain directive in go.mod

setup-go@v5 go-version-file reads the 'go' directive (1.25.0),
not the 'toolchain' directive (go1.26.1), causing a version mismatch
during coverage instrumentation.

Parse the toolchain directive from go.mod directly so the installed
Go version always matches what the module requires. Falls back to
the go directive if no toolchain line exists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------
